subject: A brass-and-gold humanoid automaton standing in a workshop, gripping a glowing violet crystalline shard; a second, similar automaton is visible behind it
description: A polished brass humanoid automaton stands in three-quarter view, its segmented metal plates catching warm light. Its featureless faceplate tilts toward a glowing violet crystalline shard clutched in its right hand — the shard radiates a soft purple glow that washes the figure's torso. A second, near-identical automaton stands further back in the dim workshop, partially obscured by shadow. The background reads as an interior space — laboratory or arcane workshop — rendered in cool blue-grey tones that contrast with the gold-warm foreground figure. The mood is quiet, investigative, almost reverent: a constructed being studying a piece of magical material.
foreground: Brass humanoid automaton holding a glowing violet shard
background: Dim workshop or laboratory interior with a second automaton in shadow
emotion: Featureless faceplate, but body language reads as curious / studious — head tilted toward the shard it examines
